top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.state = 'PR';

SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.state = 'PR';

SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.short_state = 'PR';

SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.state = 'PR';

SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.county = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.state = 'Puerto Rico';

SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.short_state = 'PR';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT zip_code.zip_code
FROM zip_code
WHERE zip_code.type = 'PO Box'
  AND zip_code.city = 'San Juan'
  AND zip_code.state = 'PR';
